description: nike fragrances Pink Paradise for women comes in a colour happy flask, styled to look like a sipper, so delectable that your olfactory senses will never get enough of this. Floral and nutsy top notes of raisins and tangerine flowers and base notes of amber and patchouli. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles. Quantity: 150 ml Caution FlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
